fk_table.title: Source Row Primary Key
fk_table.description: Primary key (pk) of the affected row in the source table — NEW.pk for INSERT/UPDATE, OLD.pk for DELETE. A logical reference only; not a database foreign key, since it may point into any audited table.

new_val.description: Full state of the row after the change, serialized as JSONB (to_jsonb(NEW)). NULL for DELETE operations.

old_val.title: Old Value
old_val.description: Full state of the row before the change, serialized as JSONB (to_jsonb(OLD)). NULL for INSERT operations.

new_metadatas.title: New Metadata
new_metadatas.description: Arbitrary structured JSONB metadata of the changed row after the change (NEW.metadatas). NULL for DELETE operations.

old_metadatas.title: Old Metadata
